subcodes.first_line: O spiritual one of truth and luminous one of creation, think not that forgetfulness shall ever overtake this prisoner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روحانی حق و نورانی خلق گمان منما که نسیان طاری این اسیر زندان گردد دمی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
